sections.title: Standard dialogue before While Guthix Sleeps

lines.speaker: Khazard Launderer
lines.text: Hello there. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Khazard Launderer
lines.text: I mainly take in washing and make sure it's good and clean for my customers. Times are tough though. Not everyone can afford such a service and it's affecting my takings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you find that very fulfilling?

lines.speaker: Khazard Launderer
lines.text: Well it can be a bit monotonous and the pay isn't good, but I set myself some goals and deliver my washing clean. My customers rarely complain, so I guess I must be doing something right.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after While Guthix Sleeps

lines.speaker: Khazard Launderer
lines.text: Hello again. Do you need anything?

lines.speaker: Khazard Launderer
lines.text: Well in that case, all the best.
